subtitle: Reps before you scroll
description:
RepScroll puts exercise between you and the feed.

Before Instagram, TikTok, or X opens — you earn it. Do push-ups (counted by on-device AI), squats, or plank. Build streaks. Unlock scroll time.

• Vision rep counting — nothing leaves your phone
• 15 minutes of scroll time per win (30 with Premium)
• Streak widget on your home screen
• Daily reminder at lights-on

Free: 1 app gate per day. Premium: unlimited gates + longer unlocks.

Stop doomscrolling. Start moving.
promotionalText: Do reps. Earn scroll time. Break the doomscroll loop.

privacy.cameraUsage: Counts exercise reps on-device. Video is never recorded or uploaded.
privacy.dataCollection: None. All workout data stays on your iPhone.
